prompt_config.style: Impressionist realism with autochrome photography texture

main_prompt: A breathtaking panoramic view of Paris 1889 during the Exposition Universelle, 16:9 horizontal format, showcasing the newly inaugurated Eiffel Tower painted in Rouge Venise (dark reddish-brown at the summit with gradient towards the base), the massive Galerie des Machines with its blue-grey steel and glass cathedral-like vault, Haussmannian buildings with cream limestone facades and grey-blue zinc roofs, bustling cobblestone streets reflecting gaslight, crowds in Belle Époque attire, volumetric lighting with warm gaslight contrasting cold electric arc lights, morning fog over the Seine, industrial revolution atmosphere with steam and coal smoke, impressionist realism style with photographic grain and slight vignetting

architecture.eiffel_tower: Newly built Eiffel Tower painted in Rouge Venise (dark red-brown color), gradient paint from dark at top to lighter at base, raw industrial modernity symbol, iron lattice structure clearly visible
architecture.galerie_des_machines: Massive industrial cathedral, blue-grey steel framework, enormous glass vault, largest arched building of the era, imposing silhouette
architecture.haussmannian_buildings: Cream-colored limestone buildings, grey-blue zinc mansard roofs, ornate wrought-iron balconies, classic Parisian architecture
architecture.street_furniture: Luisant cobblestones, green Morris columns with colorful posters, newspaper kiosks, gas street lamps

fashion_1889.women: Ladies in Belle Époque S-silhouette dresses, tightly corseted waists, long flowing skirts without large bustles, lace parasols, elaborate hats adorned with feathers and flowers, long gloves, elegant posture
fashion_1889.men: Gentlemen in dark three-piece suits and frock coats, obligatory hats (top hats for bourgeoisie, bowler hats or caps for workers), handlebar mustaches or full beards, formal Victorian gentleman style
fashion_1889.crowd: Mixed social classes, well-dressed bourgeoisie visiting the Exposition, workers in rough vests and work blouses, authentic 1889 fashion accuracy

color_palette.color_description: Muted historical palette, sepia, grey zinc, stone beige, Rouge Venise brick red, bottle green, avoiding modern digital brightness

visual_texture.film_grain: Light photographic grain simulating old film stock
visual_texture.finish: Autochrome photography aesthetic with slightly grainy pastel tones, impressionist realism à la Gustave Caillebotte and Jean Béraud

lighting_atmosphere.gaslight: Warm yellow flickering gaslight illuminating streets, soft golden glow, traditional lighting
lighting_atmosphere.electric_light: Cold blue-white electric arc lamps at the Exposition Universelle, harsh modern illumination, technological contrast
lighting_atmosphere.natural_light: Foggy morning light, atmospheric haze, volumetric lighting through steam and coal smoke
lighting_atmosphere.atmospheric_effects: Steam vapor, coal smoke from trains and factories in background, mist over the Seine river, industrial revolution atmosphere

negative_prompt: modern clothing, contemporary fashion, cars, automobiles, modern buildings, skyscrapers, neon signs, plastic materials, digital aesthetic, oversaturated colors, bronze Eiffel Tower, wrong historical period, Victorian England fashion, crinolines, large bustles, anachronistic elements, modern photography style, clean air, 21st century elements

recommended_settings.detail_level: high for architecture and fashion details

complete_prompt_string: Panoramic view of Paris 1889 during Exposition Universelle, 16:9 horizontal format, featuring the newly inaugurated Eiffel Tower painted in Rouge Venise red-brown with gradient, massive Galerie des Machines with blue-grey steel and glass vault, Haussmannian limestone buildings with zinc roofs and wrought-iron balconies, bustling cobblestone streets with reflections, crowds in authentic 1889 Belle Époque fashion, women in S-silhouette dresses with corseted waists wearing elaborate feathered hats and carrying lace parasols, men in three-piece suits and frock coats wearing top hats and bowler hats with handlebar mustaches, warm yellow gaslight contrasting with cold blue-white electric arc lights from the Exposition, foggy morning atmosphere, volumetric lighting through steam and coal smoke, mist over the Seine, green Morris columns, newspaper kiosks, sepia and zinc grey color palette with bottle green accents, impressionist realism style à la Gustave Caillebotte and Jean Béraud, autochrome photography texture with light film grain and subtle vignetting, industrial revolution atmosphere, historically accurate, cinematic composition, bustling Belle Époque Paris street scene

usage_notes.for_stable_diffusion: Use main_prompt + detailed_elements sections, add negative_prompt
usage_notes.for_dalle: Use complete_prompt_string, DALL-E 3 handles complex descriptions well
usage_notes.for_leonardo: Use main_prompt with style_keywords, set aspect ratio to 16:9
